settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.profileUpdatedDescription: Your profile information has been updated successfully.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.pushDescription: Receive push notifications on your devices.
notifications.preferencesUpdatedDescription: Your notification preferences have been updated successfully.

security.title: Security Settings
security.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all of your data.
security.passwordUpdatedDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.
security.twoFactorEnabledDescription: Your account is now more secure.
security.accountDeletedDescription: Your account has been permanently deleted.

deleteDialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.

settings.updatedDescription: Your general settings have been updated successfully.

errors.authRequiredDescription: You must be logged in to save settings.
errors.saveError: An error occurred while saving settings.
